note: HyperLiquid Mode B (UserSigned) EIP-712 typed-data surface. domain.name=HyperliquidSignTransaction, verifyingContract=0x0 (sentinel — there is NO on-chain contract; the signature authorizes an off-chain L1 action). chainId is the cosmetic signatureChainId (mainnet routing on 42161; testnet 421614 manifests exist but are NOT enforced here = representative chain). NO abi.json (no contract ABI for an off-chain sentinel) — functions is empty; the surface is the 12 signed_structs. All 12 HyperliquidTransaction:* primaryTypes are covered (6 structured hl_* + 2 permission + 4 HL-attributed hl_unknown). Decode field-pinned by the typed-data corpus (v3-harness corpus --filter hyperliquid --require-expect-body).

HyperliquidTransaction:UsdSend.reason: structured hyperliquid_core::hl_usd_send (decimal-string amount + address map losslessly from the EIP-712 message).

HyperliquidTransaction:Withdraw.reason: structured hyperliquid_core::hl_withdraw (decimal-string amount + address map losslessly from the EIP-712 message).

HyperliquidTransaction:SpotSend.reason: structured hyperliquid_core::hl_spot_send (decimal-string amount + address map losslessly from the EIP-712 message).

HyperliquidTransaction:UsdClassTransfer.reason: structured hyperliquid_core::hl_usd_class_transfer (decimal-string amount + address map losslessly from the EIP-712 message).

HyperliquidTransaction:SendAsset.reason: structured hyperliquid_core::hl_send_asset (decimal-string amount + address map losslessly from the EIP-712 message).

HyperliquidTransaction:TokenDelegate.reason: structured hyperliquid_core::hl_token_delegate (decimal-string amount + address map losslessly from the EIP-712 message).

HyperliquidTransaction:ApproveAgent.reason: permission::protocol_authorization (agent-wallet authorization; richer cross-protocol permission model).

HyperliquidTransaction:ConvertToMultiSig.reason: hyperliquid_core::hl_unknown{action_type:convertToMultiSigUser} — HL-attributed (opaque signers field; HIGH-risk account-authority change gateable by name).

HyperliquidTransaction:SendMultiSig.reason: hyperliquid_core::hl_unknown{action_type:sendMultiSig} — inner action is opaque (only its hash is signed).
